raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Nu dſinne Aäla Mauzibu
pee mannim buhdama/ un ee-
kahrſe prett ſaiveem Draugu-
teem/ prett teem Affirexeem/
kas tuwu klaht bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Kas avgehrbti bija ar pa-
filahtm Drehvehm/ un btja Leël-
Rungi un Waldneeki/ wiſsnotut
ekahrojamti Jaunekti/ Jahtnee-
ki/ kas us Sirgeem jahj/ wiſs-
notaz eekahrojamceen Jaune-
kceem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Ta dſinne winna ſawu
Mauzibu ar teem/kas wiſſi no
teem ſkaifteem Affireeu Behr-
neem bija/ un ſagantjahs ar wiſ-
teem winnu Suhnu-Deeweein/
un ar wiſſeem/ prett ko winna
eekahrſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Irwinna ne pamette ſawu
Mauzibu no Egiptes (isgahju-
ſi)/ jo tee bij vee winnas eekſch
winnaſ Jaunibas gullejſcht/ un
tahs Puppas winnaſ Jumpra-
wibas aptauſtijufchi / un leelu
Mauzibu ar tahs dſinnuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tapehz nodeewu es winnu
winnaſ Draugnu Rohkâ/ Af-
tura Behrneem Rohkâ / prett
kuveemi ta bija eekahrſuſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Schee atſedſe winnaſ
Kannumu/ nehine winnaſ Deh-
lus un winnaſ Meitas nohſt/
bet paſchu nokawe tee ar Soh-
binu . Un winna dabbuja wee-
nu Wahrodu ſtarp tahm See-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Kad nu winnaſ Mahta
Aäliba to redſeja/ tad eeſahrſe
winna niknaki neka ta ohtra/ un
winnaſ Maukoſchana bija leela-
ka/ neka winnaſ Mahfas Man-
kofchana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Winna eeſahrſe prett Af-
tura Behrneem/ teem Leel-Kun-
geem un Waldneekem/ kas tu-
wn klaht bija/kas avgehrbti bija
ar wiſſadu Skaiftumi/Jahtnee-
ki/ kas us Sirgeem jahj/ wiſs-
notaz eekahrojamceen Jaune-
kceem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tad redſeju es/ ka winna-
bija ſagahnita/ winnahin btja
abbejahm weenahds Zeffch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Tomehr ſcht wehl wairak
dſinnahs pehz kawahm Manko-
ſchanahm/ jo kad winna nomah-
letus Wihrus pee ſeenas redſe-
ia to Kaldeezu Tehlis/ kas ar
Sarkanuma rakſtitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Kas apjohti ar weenu
Johstu apkahrt ſaweem Gur-
neem/ un turreja augſtas Zep-
pures us ſawahm Galwahn/
kas wiſſi ka Walditaji iſluhko-
jahs/ tapatt ka Babels Behrni
no Kaldejas winnu Dſintenes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Ta eekahrſe winna prett
teem/ zik drihs winna Azzistoſs
eeraudſija/ un fuhtija Wehte-
ſchus pee winneem us Kaldeju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Kad nu tee Behrni no
Babeles pee winnaſ nahze ne to
Kabribas Guſſu/ tad tee ſagaſ-
nija winnu ar ſawas Manko-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
